occurrence_sentence: For example, partnerships between companies like Cyxtera and OQC have made it easier for new entrants to gain access to quantum computers.
Talking about the series, Matt Martin, Managing Director of Oxford Instruments NanoScience said, "We are proud to partner with The Quantum Insider again on our second series of Working in Quantum.
